storyboard.promptDesignRequest: Design 2-4 storyboards, return as JSON array, each containing:
storyboard.promptAsProfessional: As a professional storyboard artist, design storyboards for the following scene:
storyboard.suggestionDiversity: Consider increasing shot type diversity to avoid visual fatigue
storyboard.suggestionPacing: Shot duration varies greatly, consider adjusting for smoother pacing
storyboard.suggestionMovement: All static shots, consider adding camera movement for dynamism
storyboard.suggestionCloseUp: Lacking close-ups, consider adding close-ups to emphasize emotion
storyboard.suggestionCount: Few storyboards, consider adding more shot transitions
storyboard.defaultSuggestion: Please regenerate storyboards for better suggestions
storyboard.reasonWideForEnvironment: Wide shot is suitable for showing environment and atmosphere
storyboard.reasonOverShoulderForDialogue: Over-the-shoulder shot is a classic choice for dialogue scenes
storyboard.reasonFullForAction: Full shot is suitable for showing action and body dynamics
storyboard.reasonLowAngleForPower: Low angle makes characters appear more powerful
storyboard.reasonMediumCloseForWarmth: Medium close-up suits warm, intimate scenes
storyboard.reasonMediumUniversal: Medium shot is the most versatile shot type
storyboard.impactBalanced: Balanced display of character and environment
storyboard.reasonFollowMovement: Follow character movement, maintain visual continuity
storyboard.reasonCraneUpLiberation: Crane up suggests liberation or ending

dramaScript.templateActionDesc: Scene template focused on action description
dramaScript.templateActionDescription: The character quickly crosses the street, turns to look into the distance, looking tense.
dramaScript.templateActionVideoPrompt: Fast moving shot, following the character through the street, handheld camera style.
dramaScript.templateDialogueDescription: Two people sit across from each other in a cafe, having an in-depth conversation.
dramaScript.templateDialogueVideoPrompt: Medium shot, stable shooting, soft lighting.
dramaScript.templateEmotionDesc: Scene template focused on emotional expression
dramaScript.templateEmotionDescription: The character stands alone by the window, looking at the rain outside, eyes full of sorrow.
dramaScript.templateEmotionVideoPrompt: Close-up shot, slow push-in, soft tones.
dramaScript.templateTransitionDesc: Scene template focused on transition effects
dramaScript.templateTransitionDescription: The image gradually becomes clear from blur, revealing a brand new scene.
dramaScript.templateTransitionVideoPrompt: Fade in and out transition, slow transition.
